reviews.review_description: This is probably your first review on this game, but I wanna share my thoughts. The game is really good like I like the monsters and like the corner and stuff or she’s like no monster and stuff. I haven’t tried going into the codes yet, but the maps are cool. The monsters are cool and just great job for like your first horror game. Well if I made gorilla tag game, it will kind of be like this, but it’s just I just like it because like if I made a gorilla tag or it would be like this and it’s actually like really cool so yeah I’m reading this five star ⭐️ ￼ and can you keep where like the maps are bright and stuff cause if you keep it like that I will be like play this game forever cause I hate like gorilla tag horror games that are so dark that I can’t see but really good game ￼
